architecture.current_shape: Three stdio MCP server entry files contain transport composition and substantial domain behavior; shared helpers live under scripts/lib; generated install/API/search outputs are committed.

duplicate_sources_of_truth.risk: generation order or clock drift creates broad churn
registration, catalog, and readiness markers can disagree

duplicate_sources_of_truth.status: separate transport-local policy and formatting helpers

startup_side_effects: Tools computes allowed roots and evidence root before transport connection.
Tools loads usable capability packs before transport connection.
Core eagerly imports registry, orchestration, quality, and install modules.
All three servers define tool schemas and handlers in their entry modules.

possible_dead_or_unreachable_candidates.caveat: Heuristic only: function name appears once in its defining server. Review before deletion.

generated_artifacts.known_churn_trigger: freshness ordering and generated timestamps depend on the generation clock unless SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH is fixed

implementation_findings.finding: Core and Tools entry files are 6k+ and 8k+ lines; registration, handlers, policy, and formatting are coupled.
implementation_findings.action: Introduce shared runtime contracts and authoritative registries before adding domain families.

implementation_findings.finding: Tools metadata is represented in registration blocks, buildToolCatalog, statusObject, and readiness regexes.
implementation_findings.action: Make one registry authoritative and derive manifest/readiness from it.

implementation_findings.finding: Precision is a separate server with overlapping patch, command, docs, and verification policy.
implementation_findings.action: Move implementation into Tools modules and retain a compatibility shim.

implementation_findings.finding: 14 tests infer behavior partly by scanning server source text.
implementation_findings.action: Keep source guards only for static invariants and move behavior proof through SDK calls.

implementation_findings.finding: Generated mirrors and archives have multiple committed destinations.
implementation_findings.action: Add one deterministic generation manifest and verify all destinations in one command.

implementation_findings.finding: Client adoption emits profiles but has no unified detect/setup/backup/rollback command.
implementation_findings.action: Build vnem setup with explicit preview, backup, validation, and rollback.

implementation_findings.finding: Current entrypoint routing covers generic repo/code/browser/GitHub/Cloudflare work but lacks dedicated Windows, game, Roblox, package, database, API, and skill execution routes.
implementation_findings.action: Implement behavior-backed domain modules and add them to the authoritative registry.

implementation_findings.finding: Repeated deep source scans parse the large Tools entry file and test corpus per call.
implementation_findings.action: Cache immutable indexes by file metadata and lazy-load heavy modules.

unsafe_or_unclear: evidence writes occur from read-oriented intelligence tools
runtime error shapes vary by handler
behavior_not_fully_proven: 18 Tools are weakly tested in the live MCP surface audit
real client config mutation and rollback
approved external API execution across providers
